title: Tempting Greek Raspberry Loukoumades
description: Indulge in these earthy, aerated Greek loukoumades featuring raspberries, made in a traditional kazan cauldron over a tandoor, and friendly to gluten-free diets. This dessert is a unique blend of flavors and textures.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the gluten-free flour, sugar, yeast, and salt.
Gradually add the warm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Fold in the raspberries and let the mixture rest for 30 minutes.
Heat the vegetable oil in a kazan cauldron over medium heat on the tandoor.
Using a spoon, drop the batter into the hot oil, making sure not to overcrowd the cauldron.
Fry the loukoumades until they are golden brown and puffed up.
Remove the loukoumades from the oil with a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Drizzle the honey over the warm loukoumades and serve immediately.
